---
name: Bug report
about: Report a bug in s3-turbo-list
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

**Version / commit**
<!-- Output of `s3-turbo-list --version` or the git commit hash. -->

**OS / architecture**
<!-- e.g. Ubuntu 22.04 x86_64, macOS 14 arm64 -->

**Endpoint type**
<!-- AWS S3, MinIO, BOS (Baidu Object Storage), or other S3-compatible provider. -->

**Command used**
<!-- Paste the exact command, with credentials REMOVED.  Replace keys/tokens with `REDACTED`. -->

**Expected behaviour**
<!-- What should have happened. -->

**Actual behaviour**
<!-- What happened instead. Include error messages, exit codes, logs. -->

**Trace excerpt (sanitised)**
<!-- If available, paste relevant lines from `--trace-compat` output.  Remove bucket names, account IDs, and credentials. -->

**Sanitisation checklist**
- [ ] Bucket names have been replaced with placeholders.
- [ ] Account identifiers have been removed.
- [ ] Credentials, access keys, and tokens have been redacted.

**Reproducibility**
<!-- Can this be reproduced on MinIO (local) or AWS S3?  If yes, describe the setup. -->
